meta.author: NoxDev
meta.status: TEST FIXTURE — NOT shipped content. Intentionally malformed so the authoring validator (IFAdventureValidator) can be proven to catch each class of defect: a dangling 'turn to N', an unreachable section, a dead-end, an unwinnable graph, and a codeword read that no effect ever sets.

passages.title: Crossroads
passages.text: Two ways lead on; one is a lie.

choices.text: Follow the sign to the ghost town.

passages.title: The Barred Door
passages.text: A silver lock holds the only safe way on. Without the key, the side tunnel is all that's left.

passages.title: The Trap
passages.text: Behind the silver door the floor gives way. There was never a way to win from here.

passages.title: The Blind Tunnel
passages.text: The tunnel narrows to solid rock. There is nowhere to go and nothing to do.

passages.title: The Forgotten Vault
passages.text: No passage in the book ever tells you to turn here.
